scene_title: Dupla helice de DNA sendo alterada por Vigilante
narrative_beat: DNA dourado e carmesim com maos gigantescas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid luminous double helix DNA strand in gold and crimson with supernatural glow and light particles emerging surrounded by giant Watcher hands attempting to alter its structure in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the luminous DNA strand being altered by the giant Watcher hands
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated genetics laboratory with microscopes and centrifuges in background
props: luminous DNA in gold and crimson

mood.emotion: Genesis 6 DNA corruption — same pattern in silicon now

symbolism.primary: the Watchers editing DNA as AI now edits reality and identity
symbolism.secondary: giant hands as the scale gap between superior intelligence and human biology

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
